hook: Your environment either trains approach behavior or trains avoidance.
body: Confidence is easier to build when your week contains places where casual social friction is normal.

hook: A lifestyle built around isolation makes dating feel like a rare performance event instead of an extension of ordinary life.
body: Choose routines that expose you to people, light stakes, and repeatable interactions.

hook: Choose routines that expose you to people, light stakes, and repeatable interactions.
body: Classes, clubs, volunteer settings, group workouts, and regular third places build more usable social range than staying online all week.

body: Add one recurring environment to your calendar where conversation with strangers is normal and not forced.
